special_mechanics.name: Exaggerated Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump many times above their own height, defying realistic physics

special_mechanics.name: Slam Dunk
special_mechanics.description: Players can perform slam dunks that defy human capabilities

special_mechanics.name: Physical Contact
special_mechanics.description: Players can freely shove or elbow opponents out of the way without consequences

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No numerical physics parameters documented in sources. Game emphasizes arcade-style exaggeration over realistic movement simulation. Sources provide game history and feature descriptions but no technical movement specifications.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - NBA Jam (SNES)
